title: One Thing In A French Day
author: Laetitia Perraut
description: A daily podcast sharing simple stories about everyday life in France.

title: French Voices Podcast
author: Jessica Salomon
description: Interviews with French speakers to improve listening and cultural understanding.

title: News in Slow French
author: Linguistica 360
description: Weekly news explained slowly to help learners understand spoken French.

title: French Your Way Podcast
author: Jessica J. Gourdon
description: Short lessons focusing on grammar, pronunciation, and useful expressions.

title: Parlez Away
author: Babbel
description: A fun podcast that teaches French through stories and conversations.

title: Chef’s Table: France
author: Netflix
description: A documentary series exploring the lives of famous French chefs and cuisine.

title: Street Food: France
author: Netflix
description: Showcases French street food culture and local culinary traditions.

title: France From Above
author: Yann Arthus-Bertrand
description: A visual documentary showing aerial views of France’s landscapes and cities.

title: Versailles Documentary
author: BBC
description: Explores the history and architecture of the Palace of Versailles.

title: Paris: The Luminous Years
author: PBS
description: A documentary about Paris as a center of art, culture, and creativity.

title: Secrets of the Louvre
author: National Geographic
description: Reveals hidden stories and secrets of the famous Louvre Museum.

title: France Travel Guide Documentary
author: Travel Channel
description: A guide to exploring France’s cities, culture, and tourist attractions.
